Dr. Shelby Frederick Global Ministries

The G.R.O.W. Encounter

God Renewing Our Women
This year's theme, Immersion  —  Acts 1:1–5
DatesAugust 28–30, 2026
LocationPrivate Airbnb
SeatsLimited to 10
You've spent years taking care of everyone else. This weekend belongs to you.

Lodging

Two nights, shared with your cohort of 10 women.

Meals

Every meal, Friday evening through Sunday morning, including Breaking Bread.

All Sessions

Icebreaker, worship and movement, four breakout sessions, closing commissioning.

Welcome Box

A guided journal and keepsakes tied to each movement of your weekend.

Dr. Shelby Frederick

Your Host

Founder, Dr. Shelby Frederick Global Ministries. Doctor of Theology, Certified Faith-Based Clinical Counselor, and Transformational Wellness Coach. Shelby leads the weekend from Arrive through Rise, alongside a small team of guest facilitators.
